simple_types.name: Canonical_Parts

enumeration_literals.name: Base
enumeration_literals.description: Canonicalize the base directory of a path (all but the name)

enumeration_literals.name: All_With_Dupes
enumeration_literals.description: Canonicalize the full path, don't dedupe

enumeration_literals.name: All_Deduped
enumeration_literals.description: Canonicalize the full path, dedupe targets

record_types.name: Find_Options

fields.name: Enter_Regular_Dirs
fields.description: Beware that loops may occur and the user should break them

fields.name: Enter_Softlinked_Dirs
fields.description: Beware that loops may occur and the user should break them

fields.name: Visit_Softlinks
fields.description: Whether Action will be called on softlinks

fields.name: Canonicalize
fields.description:
Note that Complete_Deduped requires storing all found canonical paths
to avoid revisiting them through several converging softlinks, so it
may take O(n) memory on the number of paths.

record_types.name: Item

fields.name: Path
fields.description:
0 depth is for the top-level file only, <>/file_0_depth
1 depth is for files inside top-level dir, <>/dir/files_1_depth

fields.name: Depth
fields.description:
0 depth is for the top-level file only, <>/file_0_depth
1 depth is for files inside top-level dir, <>/dir/files_1_depth

record_types.name: Ls_Options

tagged_types.name: Kind_Is_Filter
tagged_types.code: type Kind_Is_Filter (Kind : Kinds) is new Filters with null record;

tagged_types.name: No_Filter
tagged_types.code: type No_Filter is new Filters with null record;

subprograms.name: Dir
Find

documentation.description:
As the procedure version, but returns the paths that would be visited.
May take a long time without feedback, and softlink dir loops will cause
infinite recursion.

subprograms.name: Find

documentation.description:
Will visit all children of This, or only This if not a directory, if it
exists. If given a Filter, Action will be only called for those matching
it. The order of visiting is alphabetical. "." and ".." are never
visited. Complexity is O(n log n) due to the sorting of entries in
a directory.

parameters.name: This
parameters.description: Use action to prevent entering a particular dir, or to stop early.

parameters.name: Action
parameters.description: Use action to prevent entering a particular dir, or to stop early.

subprograms.name: Ls

documentation.description:
Return immediate children of a directory. Won't include "." or "..".
Won't prepend Path (unless Canonicalize)

subprograms.name: Match
subprograms.code: function Match (This : Filters; Item : Path) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Match
Match

documentation.description: Multiset as to preserve the semantics of All_With_Dupes
